nasb.text: Then the king of Israel replied, “Tell him, ‘Let not him who girds on his armor boast like him who takes it off.’ ”

esv.text: And the king of Israel answered, “Tell him, ‘Let not him who straps on his armor boast himself as he who takes it off.’”

cnv.text: 以色列王回答說：“你們去告訴他，佩戴武器的人，不可像解除武器的那樣自誇。”

ccb.text: 以色列王说：“你去告诉便·哈达，叫他别刚穿上盔甲就夸口，打完仗卸下盔甲再夸口吧。”
